template.name: disbursement_ach_return_batch_header
template.description: Establish the per-file clearing balance for an ACH return file. The aggregate return amount moves from Clearing Total (10101) to the per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) instance. Per-customer return detail lines (T5207) then draw this down to zero. This is the mirror of T5203 (disbursement batch header) with reversed DR/CR direction.

financial_statements_impact.description: Asset-to-asset reclassification: Clearing Total (10101) debit balance increases and per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) credit balance increases equally. Total economic ledger assets unchanged.

template.trigger: ACH return file received, batch header. Fires once per return file before per-customer return detail lines (T5207).

ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where the return batch header establishes the per-file clearing balance under ACH Clearing Files (10104).

accounting_treatments.description: Establish the per-file return clearing balance by transferring from Clearing Total to a per-file ACH Clearing Files instance; no P&L impact.

account_code_validations.description: Permanent accumulator account (Master FBO - Clearing Total) on the economic ledger; debited to transfer the return file total to the per-file instance.
Per-file clearing instance (Master FBO - ACH Clearing Files) on the economic ledger; credited with the return file total, then drawn down to zero by per-customer return detail events (T5207).

ach_file_id.description: ACH return file reference used to create/select the per-file ACH Clearing Files (10104) instance.

expected_entry_count.description: Number of return entries expected in this file, for monitoring.

legs.description: Transfer the return file total from Clearing Total to the per-file ACH Clearing Files instance; return detail lines draw this down to zero.

examples.name: return_batch_header_200
examples.description: Batch header for a $200.00 ACH return file (ach-return-2026-03-02-001) with 1 expected return entry (Customer A $200).
